source_text:
Begin Main

StartScript EnableMenus
StartScript JTT_Init
StartScript JTT_SurvivalScript
StopScript Main

End Main

Begin EnableMenus

EnableMagicMenu
EnableInventoryMenu
EnableMapMenu
EnableStatsMenu
EnableRest
set CharGenState to -1

StopScript EnableMenus

End EnableMenus

Begin JTT_Init

short Done

if ( Done == 1 )
    StopScript JTT_Init
    return
endif

Set Done to 1
Set JTT_Hunger to 0
Set JTT_Warmth to 100
Set JTT_Wood to 0
Set JTT_Stone to 0
Set JTT_Iron to 0
Set JTT_Day to 1
Set JTT_PlayerInit to 1

player->AddItem "jtt_bone_club" 1
player->AddItem "jtt_tribal_loincloth" 1
player->AddItem "jtt_jungle_berry" 5
player->AddItem "jtt_bone_torch" 1

MessageBox "Jungle Troll Tribes Survival! Gather wood and stone from nodes. Hunt animals for meat. Cook food at campfires. Craft gear at workbenches. Build outpost campfires to survive the wilds. Stay fed and warm!"

StopScript JTT_Init

End JTT_Init

Begin JTT_SurvivalScript

float HungerTimer
float WarmthTimer
float LastDay

Set HungerTimer to ( HungerTimer + GetSecondsPassed )
Set WarmthTimer to ( WarmthTimer + GetSecondsPassed )

if ( HungerTimer >= 300 )
    Set HungerTimer to 0
    Set JTT_Hunger to ( JTT_Hunger + 5 )
    if ( JTT_Hunger > 100 )
        Set JTT_Hunger to 100
    endif
    if ( JTT_Hunger >= 80 )
        MessageBox "You are starving! Find food!"
        player->ModCurrentHealth -3
    else
        if ( JTT_Hunger >= 50 )
            MessageBox "You are growing hungry..."
        endif
    endif
endif

if ( WarmthTimer >= 60 )
    Set WarmthTimer to 0
    if ( GameHour >= 20 )
        Set JTT_Warmth to ( JTT_Warmth - 5 )
    else
        if ( GameHour <= 6 )
            Set JTT_Warmth to ( JTT_Warmth - 5 )
        else
            if ( JTT_Warmth < 100 )
                Set JTT_Warmth to ( JTT_Warmth + 2 )
            endif
        endif
    endif
    if ( JTT_Warmth < 0 )
        Set JTT_Warmth to 0
    endif
    if ( JTT_Warmth > 100 )
        Set JTT_Warmth to 100
    endif
    if ( JTT_Warmth <= 20 )
        MessageBox "You are freezing! Find fire!"
        player->ModCurrentFatigue -15
    else
        if ( JTT_Warmth <= 40 )
            MessageBox "The cold bites at you..."
        endif
    endif
endif

if ( DaysPassed > LastDay )
    Set LastDay to DaysPassed
    Set JTT_Day to ( JTT_Day + 1 )
    MessageBox "Day %g of survival.", JTT_Day
endif

End JTT_SurvivalScript

Begin JTT_WoodNode

short HarvestCount

if ( OnActivate == 1 )
    if ( HarvestCount >= 3 )
        MessageBox "This tree is fully harvested."
    else
        Set HarvestCount to ( HarvestCount + 1 )
        Set JTT_Wood to ( JTT_Wood + 2 )
        if ( HarvestCount == 1 )
            MessageBox "+2 Wood (2 harvests left)"
        endif
        if ( HarvestCount == 2 )
            MessageBox "+2 Wood (1 harvest left)"
        endif
        if ( HarvestCount == 3 )
            MessageBox "+2 Wood. Node depleted."
        endif
    endif
endif

End JTT_WoodNode

Begin JTT_StoneNode

short HarvestCount

if ( OnActivate == 1 )
    if ( HarvestCount >= 3 )
        MessageBox "This outcrop is fully mined."
    else
        Set HarvestCount to ( HarvestCount + 1 )
        Set JTT_Stone to ( JTT_Stone + 2 )
        if ( HarvestCount == 1 )
            MessageBox "+2 Stone (2 harvests left)"
        endif
        if ( HarvestCount == 2 )
            MessageBox "+2 Stone (1 harvest left)"
        endif
        if ( HarvestCount == 3 )
            MessageBox "+2 Stone. Node depleted."
        endif
    endif
endif

End JTT_StoneNode

Begin JTT_HerbNode

short HarvestCount

if ( OnActivate == 1 )
    if ( HarvestCount >= 3 )
        MessageBox "This patch is picked clean."
    else
        Set HarvestCount to ( HarvestCount + 1 )
        player->AddItem "jtt_jungle_berry" 2
        player->AddItem "jtt_jungle_root" 1
        if ( HarvestCount == 1 )
            MessageBox "+2 Berries, +1 Root (2 harvests left)"
        endif
        if ( HarvestCount == 2 )
            MessageBox "+2 Berries, +1 Root (1 harvest left)"
        endif
        if ( HarvestCount == 3 )
            MessageBox "Last harvest. +2 Berries, +1 Root."
        endif
    endif
endif

End JTT_HerbNode

Begin JTT_Campfire

short State
short Button

if ( OnActivate == 1 )
    if ( State == 0 )
        MessageBox "The campfire crackles." "Cook Food" "Warm Up" "Leave"
        set State to 1
    endif
endif

if ( State == 1 )
    set Button to GetButtonPressed
    if ( Button == -1 )
        return
    endif
    if ( Button == 0 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_raw_meat" >= 1 )
            player->RemoveItem "jtt_raw_meat" 1
            Set JTT_Hunger to ( JTT_Hunger - 30 )
            if ( JTT_Hunger < 0 )
                Set JTT_Hunger to 0
            endif
            MessageBox "You cook and eat meat. Hunger reduced."
        else
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_jungle_berry" >= 3 )
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_jungle_berry" 3
                Set JTT_Hunger to ( JTT_Hunger - 15 )
                if ( JTT_Hunger < 0 )
                    Set JTT_Hunger to 0
                endif
                MessageBox "You cook berries. Hunger reduced."
            else
                MessageBox "Need raw meat or 3+ berries to cook."
            endif
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 1 )
        Set JTT_Warmth to 100
        MessageBox "The fire warms you fully."
    endif
    set State to 0
endif

End JTT_Campfire

Begin JTT_Workbench

short State
short Button

if ( OnActivate == 1 )
    if ( State == 0 )
        MessageBox "Crafting Workbench" "Hatchet (2W 2S)" "Shield (3W 1S)" "Spear (3W 3S)" "Iron Knife (2I)" "Leave"
        set State to 1
    endif
endif

if ( State == 1 )
    set Button to GetButtonPressed
    if ( Button == -1 )
        return
    endif
    if ( Button == 0 )
        if ( JTT_Wood >= 2 )
            if ( JTT_Stone >= 2 )
                set JTT_Wood to ( JTT_Wood - 2 )
                set JTT_Stone to ( JTT_Stone - 2 )
                player->AddItem "jtt_stone_hatchet" 1
                MessageBox "Crafted: Stone Hatchet!"
            else
                MessageBox "Need 2 Stone."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 2 Wood."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 1 )
        if ( JTT_Wood >= 3 )
            if ( JTT_Stone >= 1 )
                set JTT_Wood to ( JTT_Wood - 3 )
                set JTT_Stone to ( JTT_Stone - 1 )
                player->AddItem "jtt_bone_shield" 1
                MessageBox "Crafted: Bone Shield!"
            else
                MessageBox "Need 1 Stone."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 3 Wood."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 2 )
        if ( JTT_Wood >= 3 )
            if ( JTT_Stone >= 3 )
                set JTT_Wood to ( JTT_Wood - 3 )
                set JTT_Stone to ( JTT_Stone - 3 )
                player->AddItem "jtt_obsidian_spear" 1
                MessageBox "Crafted: Obsidian Spear!"
            else
                MessageBox "Need 3 Stone."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 3 Wood."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 3 )
        if ( JTT_Iron >= 2 )
            set JTT_Iron to ( JTT_Iron - 2 )
            player->AddItem "jtt_flint_dagger" 1
            MessageBox "Crafted: Iron Knife! (used flint_dagger model)"
        else
            MessageBox "Need 2 Iron. Mine iron deposits."
        endif
    endif
    set State to 0
endif

End JTT_Workbench

Begin JTT_BuildSite

short Built
short State
short Button

if ( Built == 1 )
    if ( OnActivate == 1 )
        if ( State == 0 )
            MessageBox "Your campfire burns." "Cook Food" "Warm Up" "Leave"
            set State to 1
        endif
    endif
    if ( State == 1 )
        set Button to GetButtonPressed
        if ( Button == -1 )
            return
        endif
        if ( Button == 0 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_raw_meat" >= 1 )
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_raw_meat" 1
                Set JTT_Hunger to ( JTT_Hunger - 30 )
                if ( JTT_Hunger < 0 )
                    Set JTT_Hunger to 0
                endif
                MessageBox "You cook and eat meat."
            else
                if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_jungle_berry" >= 3 )
                    player->RemoveItem "jtt_jungle_berry" 3
                    Set JTT_Hunger to ( JTT_Hunger - 15 )
                    if ( JTT_Hunger < 0 )
                        Set JTT_Hunger to 0
                    endif
                    MessageBox "You cook berries."
                else
                    MessageBox "Need raw meat or 3+ berries."
                endif
            endif
        endif
        if ( Button == 1 )
            Set JTT_Warmth to 100
            MessageBox "Warmth restored."
        endif
        set State to 0
    endif
    return
endif

if ( OnActivate == 1 )
    if ( State == 0 )
        MessageBox "Empty clearing. Build campfire? (3 Wood)" "Build" "Cancel"
        set State to 1
    endif
endif

if ( State == 1 )
    set Button to GetButtonPressed
    if ( Button == -1 )
        return
    endif
    if ( Button == 0 )
        if ( JTT_Wood >= 3 )
            set JTT_Wood to ( JTT_Wood - 3 )
            set Built to 1
            MessageBox "Campfire built! Use it to cook and warm up."
        else
            MessageBox "Need 3 Wood."
        endif
    endif
    set State to 0
endif

End JTT_BuildSite

Begin JTT_TribalDrum

short Activated

if ( OnActivate == 1 )
    if ( Activated == 0 )
        Set Activated to 1
        MessageBox "The tribal drum strengthens your spirit!"
    else
        MessageBox "The drum still echoes."
    endif
endif

if ( Activated == 1 )
    Set Activated to 0
endif

End JTT_TribalDrum

Begin JTT_IronNode

short HarvestCount

if ( OnActivate == 1 )
    if ( HarvestCount >= 3 )
        MessageBox "This deposit is fully mined."
    else
        Set HarvestCount to ( HarvestCount + 1 )
        Set JTT_Iron to ( JTT_Iron + 2 )
        player->AddItem "jtt_iron_ore" 2
        if ( HarvestCount == 1 )
            MessageBox "+2 Iron Ore (2 harvests left)"
        endif
        if ( HarvestCount == 2 )
            MessageBox "+2 Iron Ore (1 harvest left)"
        endif
        if ( HarvestCount == 3 )
            MessageBox "+2 Iron Ore. Deposit exhausted."
        endif
    endif
endif

End JTT_IronNode
